name: Smoked Beef Roast & Pork Roast
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Wine - dry, red or white
recipeInstructions:
1. Make deep punctures in each roast using a knife.
2. Insert one garlic clove, one long pepper, and one green onion into each hole.
3. Trim the excess pepper and onion even with the surface of the meat.
4. Sprinkle salt and red pepper over the roasts.
5. When ready to start smoking, place pre-soaked smoking wood (such as pecan or hickory) on the briquets.
6. Place seasonings in the water pan and add water to the top of the pan.
7. Place the beef roast, followed by the pork roast, into the cooker.
8. Allow the roasts to cook while you sleep. One 10-pound bag of charcoal is usually sufficient.
GRAVY
1. Combine 1/2 cup flour and 1/4 cup oil to make a roux.
2. Add cold water until the mixture is blended.
3. Stir in juice from the smoker cooker pan as desired.
4. Simmer, stirring frequently, until the gravy thickens slightly.
5. Serve over rice.
From the files of Earl Shelsby
From: Gail Shipp
Date: 21 Aug 96
